Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura, CSR: Linda Chavez.
Teddy Tsao-Wu, Esq. for Petitioner: Rui Mei Ye, present as Guardian at litem for: Anna Fang a minor Claimant. Mandarin Interpreter: Teddy Tsao-wu for the petitioner. Parties were sworn and examined.
